event: Portrait of the chairman of the Azov-Don Commercial Bank
description: A full-length portrait of an elderly gentleman with white hair and a well-trimmed white beard, seated in an ornate carved wooden armchair. He wears a dark suit and holds his hands in his lap, one hand resting on the chair arm. His expression is dignified and composed. The background is plain with muted green and pink tones. The painting style is precise and realistic, capturing the sitter's authority and refinement.

_meta.title: Portrait of the Chairman of the Azov-Don Commercial Bank in St. Petersburg, A.B. Nenttsel
